form.label: Interfaces Utilization with Traffic by ports, source/destination, CBQoS

search.query: | inputlookup interfaces_20003_lookup | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT management_ip | eval management_ip = if(management_ip=="Unassigned", exp_ip, mvindex(management_ip, 0) ) | lookup `is_local_lookup` interfaces_lookup nfo_hostname management_ip snmp_index as ifIndex OUTPUT if_name as ifname_interfaces | eval final_interface = if(ifname_interfaces=="unknown",ifName,ifname_interfaces) | eval final_interface = if(ifName!="",ifIndex." ( ".final_interface." )",ifIndex) | table exp_ip final_interface ifIndex | eval exp_ip_search=if("$exp_ip$"=="*","null","$exp_ip$") | where exp_ip=exp_ip_search AND ifIndex!="" | dedup ifIndex sortby -str(final_interface) | appendpipe [ stats count | eval ifIndex="*" | where count==0 | fields - count ]

`netflow_search_rule_20067` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" $advanced_filter$ | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(packets_in) as sum_packets_in sum(flow_count) as sum_flow_count by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip src_port src_host dest_ip dest_port dest_host transport input_snmp output_snmp flow_smpl_id sum_by_exp _time | eval snmps=input_snmp+","+output_snmp | eval snmps=split(snmps,",") | `sampling(sum_packets_in)` | `sampling(sum_flow_count)`

table.title: Iterfaces by % of Use (Click on a row to see details)

search.query: | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(sum_packets_in) as sumpacketsin by exp_ip sum_by_exp snmps _time nfo_hostname | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount perc95(avgbits) as p95 max(avgbits) as Max min(avgbits) as Min stdev(avgbits) as StDev by exp_ip sum_by_exp snmps nfo_hostname | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | `get_iface_name(snmp_name, snmps)` | search snmps = "$interface$" | `get_iface_speed(snmp_speed, snmps)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" snmp_name exp_snmp | eval TrafficSpeedBoth=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval MaxTraffic=Max/1000000 | eval MinTraffic=Min/1000000 | eval StDev = StDev/1000000 | eval p95=p95/1000000 | eval percOfUsageBoth = round(TrafficSpeedBoth/(snmp_speed)*100, 2) | sort - percOfUsageBoth TrafficSpeedBoth | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_exp/2 | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | head 100 | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps Both, TrafficSpeedBoth, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps Both, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Min Mbps Both, MinTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Standard Deviation Mbps, StDev, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(95pct Mbps, p95, 2)` | table nfo_hostname exp_snmp "Max Mbps Both" "95pct Mbps" "Min Mbps Both" "Standard Deviation Mbps" "Average Mbps Both" percOfUsageBoth pct TrafficLine "Average Packets/s" PacketsLine | rename exp_snmp as "Device/Interface" | rename percOfUsageBoth as "% of Usage Both" | rename pct as "% of Total" | rename nfo_hostname as NFO

chart.title: Traffic by Direction for Device/interface "$Device/Interface$" reported by NFO $NFO$ (Click on In or Out to see network conversations below)

search.query: | search nfo_hostname="$NFO$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | eval DirectionIN=if(exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$","In","") | eval DirectionOUT=if(exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$","Out","") | eval Direction=DirectionIN+","+DirectionOUT | makemv Direction delim="," | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes_in) by Direction,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

table.title: Conversations Traffic Details: "$Device/Interface$/$Direction$" reported by NFO $NFO$

search.query: | search nfo_hostname="$NFO$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | eval exp_snmp_dir = "$Device/Interface$/$Direction$" | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp )` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name "/Out" exp_osnmp | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp )` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name "/In" exp_isnmp | where (exp_snmp_dir == exp_isnmp) OR (exp_snmp_dir == exp_osnmp) | `sampling(sum_packets_in)` | `sampling(sum_flow_count)` | fillnull value="" transport | `conversation_basesearch(TrafficAmount,"$span_token$",$span_int$,$range$)`

| search nfo_hostname="$NFO$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | `format_port_column(src_port_string, src_port)` | search service!=unknown | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes_in) by src_port_string,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

| search nfo_hostname="$NFO$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | `format_port_column(dest_port_string, dest_port)` | search service!=unknown | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes_in) by dest_port_string,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

| search nfo_hostname="$NFO$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by exp_ip src_ip | `format_ip_column(src_ip_string, src_ip, l_src_host)` | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes_in) by src_ip_string,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

| search nfo_hostname="$NFO$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | eventstats latest(dest_host) as l_dest_host by exp_ip dest_ip | `format_ip_column(dest_ip_string, dest_ip, l_dest_host)` | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes_in) by dest_ip_string,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

| search nfo_hostname="$NFO$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | fillnull value=0 src_tos | eval src_decimal=floor((src_tos)/4) | lookup `is_local_lookup` diffserv_lookup decimal AS src_decimal OUTPUT bitmap AS src_bitmap DSCP AS src_dscp | eval src_bitmap = if(src_bitmap = "000000", 0, ltrim(src_bitmap, "0")) | strcat src_bitmap " (" src_dscp ")" qos_string | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes_in) by qos_string,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

| search nfo_hostname="$NFO$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | fillnull value=0 dest_tos | eval dest_decimal=floor((dest_tos)/4) | lookup `is_local_lookup` diffserv_lookup decimal AS dest_decimal OUTPUT bitmap AS dest_bitmap DSCP AS dest_dscp | eval dest_bitmap = if(dest_bitmap = "000000", 0, ltrim(dest_bitmap, "0")) | strcat dest_bitmap " (" dest_dscp ")" qos_string | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes_in) by qos_string,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10067: Top Traffic Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20067). This Module identifies hosts with the most traffic. It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol, Input interface, Output interface. This Module is packaged in NFO “Network Traffic and Devices Monitor” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
